name: Feta & Greens
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds fresh spinach OR mixed bitter greens (such as Swiss chard)
12 ounces elbow macaroni (white or whole wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion coarsely and set aside.
2. Pick over the greens, wash, and tear into large pieces; set aside in a colander.
3. Dice the feta cheese.
4. Bring a large pot of water to boil for the macaroni.
5. Begin cooking the macaroni; do not drain.
6. In a Dutch oven, heat olive oil.
7. Add chopped onions and sauté until soft (do not brown).
8. Add greens and cover the pot; cook for several minutes, stirring once or twice, until spinach is cooked down.
9. Add feta cubes and cook, stirring constantly, until feta is completely melted.
10. As soon as macaroni is al dente, lift it from the pasta water with a strainer or large slotted spoon directly into the spinach and feta mixture.
11. Stir to combine well; the spinach has a tendency to clump.
